title: marketing ‚Äî PHP attribute contracts
description: Three class-level attributes. `#[AsMarketingListener]` subscribes a service to marketing-lane events (event lifecycle + delivery lifecycle + circuit-breaker + dead-letter). `#[AsMarketingProvider]` marks a class as a provider driver ‚Äî the MarketingProviderManager discovers these at boot and registers them via createXxxDriver factories. `#[AsDomainEventMapper]` marks a class as a domain-event ‚Üí marketing-event mapper; the DomainEventMapper registry auto-discovers these and wires the appropriate listener.

attributes.name: AsMarketingListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to marketing-lane events (MarketingEventCaptured / Dispatched / Delivered / Failed / SuppressedByConsent / Superseded, MarketingDelivery* variants, MarketingProviderCircuitBreaker*, MarketingDeadLetter*). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events. Consumers of MarketingDeadLetterCreated should override queue to `marketing-critical` since dead-letter creation is a P1 signal.

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`MarketingEventCaptured`, `MarketingDeadLetterCreated`, `MarketingProviderCircuitBreakerOpened`, ‚Ä¶). Empty = subscribe to every `Academorix\Growth\Marketing\Events\*` event. Names resolve against events.json at boot; typos abort boot with a discovery error.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (see events.json).

params.name: priority
params.description: Handler ordering within a single event. Lower runs first. Cascade listeners (SuppressPendingMarketingOnConsentRevoked) declare priority 20 so they run before dispatch listeners.

attributes.name: AsMarketingProvider
attributes.description: Marks a class as a marketing provider driver. The MarketingProviderManager discovers these at boot and registers a createXxxDriver factory keyed on the slug. Every driver MUST implement the IMarketingProvider contract (name(), supports(MarketingEventType), dispatch(...), transform(...)) + ship a JSON Schema under data/providers/<slug>-config.schema.json for config validation.

params.name: slug
params.description: Provider slug matching the MarketingProvider enum (meta_capi, google_ads, google_analytics_4, gtm_server, tiktok_events, linkedin_insight, snapchat_capi, pinterest_capi, custom_webhook). One driver class per slug.

params.name: supports
params.description: MarketingEventType values this provider can dispatch. Read at boot into data/provider-capability-matrix.json (source of truth). MarketingProviderConfigObserver enforces enabled_event_types is a subset of this list.

params.name: requires_hashed_pii
params.description: true = the driver's transform() method MUST hash email + phone + name via PiiHasher before dispatch. Meta CAPI, Snapchat, Pinterest, TikTok, LinkedIn: true. Google Ads: accepts both (driver hashes anyway). GA4, GTM Server, Custom Webhook: false.

params.name: supports_test_mode
params.description: true = the driver has a distinct sandbox endpoint or test_event_code contract. Every day-1 provider supports test mode.

attributes.name: AsDomainEventMapper
attributes.description: Marks a class as a domain-event ‚Üí marketing-event mapper. The MarketingEventCapturer's discovery loop reads this at boot and wires the listener path. One mapper class per (domain_event_class, marketing_event_type) pair. Mappers are pure ‚Äî they take a domain event + return a MarketingEventData DTO ready for insertion.

params.name: domain_event_class
params.description: Fully-qualified class name of the domain event this mapper handles (e.g. 'Academorix\User\Events\UserRegistered').

params.name: marketing_event_type
params.description: The MarketingEventType value this mapper produces (e.g. 'signup', 'subscription_started', 'refund_issued').

params.name: deduplication_key_pattern
params.description: Interpolation pattern for the deduplication_key. Available placeholders: {subject_id}, {event_id}, {domain_field.X}. E.g. 'signup:{subject_id}' or 'sub:{subject_id}:started' or 'refund:{domain_field.refund_id}'. Must produce a unique key per business milestone ‚Äî if two domain events map to the same key, the observer marks the older event superseded.

params.name: condition
params.description: Optional Symfony ExpressionLanguage predicate against the domain event. When set, the mapper is applied only when the expression returns true. E.g. "event.payment_status == 'paid'" on facility.BookingCreated to fire session_booked only for paid bookings.
